nodes.name: Promote Trigger
nodes.notes: On-demand promotion. Add a cron trigger later if you want scheduled promotion sweeps.

nodes.name: Query Inbox Rows
nodes.notes: Integration Inbox (Quarantine). Returns all rows; the code node filters Record Lifecycle = Validated + Entity Type = portfolio (n8n Notion select filters are unreliable — Bug 28 — so filter in code). Attach Notion credential in UI (Bug 26).

nodes.name: Query Portfolio Programs
nodes.notes: PMO Portfolio Register. Used to resolve program name -> page id. Promotion UPDATES an existing program only; it never creates one. Attach Notion credential in UI.

nodes.name: Update PMO Program
nodes.notes: UPDATE existing program (matched by name). Writes Health Score + RAG + Status Notes + Last Review Date — same fields Auto-Status Sync writes. Attach Notion credential in UI.

propertyValues.textContent: ={{ 'Promoted to PMO program ' + $('Build PMO Updates').item.json.program + ' @ ' + $('Build PMO Updates').item.json.promoted_at }}

nodes.name: Mark Inbox Promoted
nodes.notes: Flips the Inbox row to Promoted and stamps Promoted To = 'PMO Portfolio Register' (the lifecycle gate's exit). Reads inbox_page_id from Build PMO Updates so the pairing survives the upstream Update node. Attach Notion credential in UI.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ promoted: $runIndex + 1, program: $('Build PMO Updates').item.json.program, lifecycle: 'Promoted', promoted_to: 'PMO' }) }}
